title: ORGANIC Balloons [100 pcs] ✓ Made in Europe ✓ Birthday Party Ballons ✓ Natural Latex ✓ Rainbow Colours ✓ Helium Balloons - 11 Metallic Colour Ballons - Latex Party Decorations
features: 🎈 CLIMATE NEUTRAL BALLOONS FROM EUROPE - 100 colourful balloons in 11 colours - 27cm diameter - climate-neutral production in Europe

🎈 MADE FROM NATURAL RAW MATERIALS - Our happy birthday balloons are made from renewable natural rubber and are therefore particularly sustainable, resource-saving and fair - for a party without worries and with a clear conscience. That's why our balloons are 100% compostable.

🎈 POLLUTANT-FREE BALLOONS - Our balloons pack is regularly tested for nitrosamines, plasticisers and solvents by an approved institute and meet the standards of the European Toy Safety Directive 2009/48/EC.

🎈 LUMINOUS COLOURS: Our set consists of 11 beautiful colours. We have made sure that the balloons retain their great colours even when inflated. Ideal as decorations for children's birthdays, baby showers, weddings or christenings.
🎈 HELIUM SUITABLE - Our balloons are suitable for filling with helium and last around 8 hours when filled with helium.
description: Product Description BASTELBÄR BALLOONS - BEST CHOICE FOR YOUR PEACE OF MIND Have you ever had a strange taste in your mouth when blowing up balloons? Did the balloons smell strange, kind of chemical? This is because not all balloons are the same. Many manufacturers skip quality controls to save costs and use cheap and sometimes harmful ingredients. Did you know that the chemicals in cheap balloons can be carcinogenic? Of course you don't want to decorate your party or let your children play with such balloons. That's why we have all our balloons made and assembled in the EU. Our balloons are regularly inspected by TÜV and are therefore free of harmful substances. They even comply with the extremely strict European toy directive EN-71. ORGANIC BALLOONS FROM EUROPE Carefree celebrations with our balloons - safe and environ mentally conscious! Locally & fairly produced in Europe 100% natural latex - 0% plastic Biodegradable and compostable Made from renewable raw materials Pollutant-free - unlike almost all cheap balloons from China, our balloons contain no carcinogenic substances ORGANIC BALLOONS FROM BASTELBÄR - RESPONSIBLY PRODUCED IN EUROPE Made in EU Our balloons are manufactured in Europe to the highest quality standards and comply with the extremely strict European toy standard EN-71 Balloons made of natural latex With our sustainable balloons made from 100% natural rubber latex, you can not only decorate your party also protect the environment at the same time. Colourful and bright Thanks to the use of environ mentally friendly special pigments, our balloons are a real eye-catcher even when full. Tough and durable Our balloons are 20% thicker than conventional balloons, they are particularly robust and durable. When filled with air, they last for several weeks. HIGH-QUALITY BALLOONS SUITABLE FOR ANY EVENT PARTY FUN FOR YOUNG AND OLD Whether you're planning a birthday party for a little adventurer, an elegant wedding for the happy couple or an anniversary celebration for a work colleague - our balloons are perfect for any occasion. With their bold & bright colours, they are guaranteed to create the right ambience. HELIUM SUITABLE Our balloons are also suitable for filling with helium. For maximum floating power, we recommend filling them on the day of the party. We also offer matching quick-release fasteners with decorative ribbon. FOR A CAREFREE PARTY Regional & Fair In our supply chain, we prioritise local suppliers and thus promote jobs with fair pay in Europe Compost able As our balloons are made from natural raw materials, they are 100% compost able and can be disposed of with organic waste Free of harmful substances We rely on strict quality controls and high-quality materials to protect your health. Our commitment Bastelbär stands for environ mentally conscious and colourful balloons that are simply fun.
